'''Belinda Vog''' was the owner and operator of [[Vog Salvage, Inc.]] She led a team of [[Scavenger/Legends|salvagers]] to [[the Graveyard]] to follow a rumor that the [[Royal Palace of Alderaan/Legends|Aldera Royal Palace]] had somehow survived the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|Destruction of Alderaan]] and that the wealth of the building was contained in [[Asteroid 7785|one]] of the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] in the Graveyard. However, when Vog's team arrived at the asteroid field, they discovered that the rumor was unfounded.

{{Char-stub}}
